text.title: Zero-Click Search Adaptation Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the page show impressions stable/up AND clicks down ≥25% AND CTR ≤ 1.0% over 90 days?

branch.question: Are all preconditions present (top-10 SERP snapshot AND ≥3 original data points AND named owner)?

branch.conclusion: Run the rewrite: produce JSON-LD + 40-60 word lede + KPI set per output contract.
Skip this methodology. Surface the missing precondition; defer until inputs are ready.
Skip this methodology. The page is not AIO-suppressed; route to standard SEO maintenance.

text.example: page=/post-1 impressions=+8% clicks=-31% ctr=0.7% → aio_suppression=true; data_points=4 owner=ruslan@faion.net → run rewrite per r2-schema-mandatory.
